summary: Frontend re-test after change request: preloader + hero reveal, all 13 asset slots with correct filenames, moodboard is SECOND slide (slider-dot-1), and prior flows (archive filters/detail/flip/download, film modal unmuted with controls, upload flow, social reel, pixel cursor) all pass. No page/runtime errors.

issues: Benign framer-motion warning: 'container has a non-static position...' — from a useScroll target. No functional impact (carried over from iteration_1).

action_items: Optional: silence framer-motion useScroll warning by adding position:relative to the scroll target container.
critical_code_review_comments: Preloader: robust — climbs to 100% then unmounts via AnimatePresence with ~650ms delay, then Hero receives started=true (counter animation gated correctly).
AssetImage: uses data-testid=asset-<filename> and gracefully falls back to labeled placeholder on onError — drop-in ready as intended.
ConceptSlider SLIDES array: index 0 websiteConcepts, index 1 MOODBOARD (correct), index 2 emailConcept. AnimatePresence mode='wait' means only the active slide's AssetImage is mounted — expected.
evidence-card-print.jpg slot only mounts after a successful upload (Upload.jsx result state) — verified by uploading a small JPG.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 asset test-ids exist. Note that moodboard.jpg, email-concept.jpg (only in ConceptSlider, active slide), and evidence-card-print.jpg (only in Upload result) are conditionally mounted — trigger the appropriate flow to see them. Preloader takes ~2s. sort-oldest is a Radix Select item in a portal; direct playwright click after opening trigger required force=True on portalized option (minor, not blocking).
verified_flows: Preloader appears with 'Evidence is loading' + preloader-pct climbs to 100 then disappears
Hero counter reaches '42,817 entries and counting' after preloader done
Floating archive-card slot inside hero-section (asset-archive-card.jpg) with stickers visible
All 13 asset-<filename> testids exist across the site (moodboard/email-concept via slider, evidence-card-print via upload result)
concept-slider: slider-dot-1 (index 1) renders asset-moodboard.jpg; next/prev cycle slides correctly
Archive filters (stains/tears/fades/repairs/all-evidence) all present; tile -> detail modal -> ArchiveCard flip + download PNG + close all work
Film modal opens with controls attribute and muted=false
Upload: dropzone -> input accepts JPG -> upload-loading -> upload-result -> reset back to dropzone
Social reel + social-generate-btn present; pixel cursor rendered on desktop
